components.title: patient-intake-api
components.description: Telehealth Patient Intake API: API Gateway HTTP API, Lambda handler, DynamoDB submissions table, and S3 uploads bucket, hardened by a Terraform compliance baseline that closes starter gaps GAP-01 through GAP-04, GAP-07, and GAP-08 under the HIPAA Security Rule.
components.purpose: Collect and store patient intake submissions (PHI) with audit-defensible technical safeguards.

control-implementations.description: NIST 800-53 Rev 5 controls implemented by the Terraform baseline. Each requirement cites the HIPAA Security Rule section it satisfies and the starter gap it closes.

implemented-requirements.description: Closes GAP-01 and GAP-02 (HIPAA 164.312(a)(2)(iv)). PHI at rest is encrypted under a customer-managed KMS CMK with rotation enabled: the S3 uploads bucket via aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration (sse_algorithm aws:kms) and the DynamoDB intake table via a server_side_encryption override referencing the same CMK. Policy gap01_s3_cmk_encryption.rego and gap02_dynamodb_cmk.rego fail any plan reintroducing the gaps.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle: plan.json + conftest-results.json from the green run.

implemented-requirements.description: Closes GAP-03 (HIPAA 164.312(e)(1)). The uploads bucket policy explicitly denies all S3 actions when aws:SecureTransport is false, so PHI cannot transit unencrypted. Policy gap03_s3_tls_only.rego fails any plan lacking the deny.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle: plan.json + conftest-results.json from the green run.

implemented-requirements.description: Closes GAP-04 (HIPAA 164.308(a)(7)). S3 versioning is enabled on the uploads bucket so PHI overwrites and deletions are recoverable, supporting contingency-plan data-backup requirements. Policy gap04_s3_versioning.rego enforces it.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle: plan.json + conftest-results.json from the green run.

implemented-requirements.description: Closes GAP-07 (HIPAA 164.312(a)(1)). The Lambda role's inline policy is overridden from service wildcards (dynamodb:*, s3:*) to least privilege: dynamodb:PutItem on the intake table, s3:PutObject on the uploads prefix, and kms:GenerateDataKey/Decrypt on the PHI CMK only. Policy gap07_iam_least_privilege.rego fails any plan containing service-level wildcards.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle: plan.json + conftest-results.json from the green run.

implemented-requirements.description: Closes GAP-08 (HIPAA 164.312(b)). API Gateway access logging is enabled to a dedicated CloudWatch log group with 90-day retention, recording request ID, source IP, method, route, and status for every request touching PHI. Throttling (burst 100 / rate 50) limits abuse. Policy gap08_apigw_logging.rego enforces the logging configuration.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle: plan.json + conftest-results.json from the green run.

implemented-requirements.description: GAP-05 (Lambda VPC placement) and GAP-06 (reserved concurrency, DLQ, X-Ray) are acknowledged and not yet remediated in Terraform. They are tracked as planned improvements; GAP-06 supports HIPAA 164.308(a)(7) contingency operations. The CI gate and this component will be updated when they are closed.

links.text: Gap register: GAP-05 and GAP-06 remain open by design.
